templates.body:
CONTROL PANEL CABINET CHARTER
Chair (VP): _______________
Directs (seats): _______________
Cadence: weekly  Length: ___ min
Purpose: shared control panel + decisions
Out of scope this hour: _______________
Scribe: _______________  First date: _______

PANEL SECTION MAP
Section | Owner direct | Metrics/risks in slice | Update minutes
Support ops | | | 5-8
_____________ | | | 
_____________ | | | 
Rule: no section without an owner

CABINET AGENDA (60)
0-5: open risks from last week
5-40: each direct 5-8 min on THEIR panel slice (what moved, what is red, one ask)
40-55: cross-silo decisions
55-60: log owners and due dates
Ban: long monologue with no ask

CROSS-ASK LOG
Week: _______
From seat: _______________  To seat: _______________
Ask: _______________
Decision: _______________  Due: _______
Blocks customer/revenue/risk: Y/N

CABINET DECISION LOG
Week: _______
Decision: _______________
Owner: _______________  Due: _______
Panel section affected: _______________
